subject: feat(pwa): add dynamic meta theme-color that updates per DaisyUI theme
body:
Status bar (time, wifi, battery) now reflects the active theme color in
PWA standalone mode. Uses canva-grid's proven pattern: light themes get
primary/neutral hex (dark enough for white text), dark themes get
base-100 hex. Fixes the invisible status bar text bug from the old
approach of using page background colors.

Tags: pwa, theme, ui, status-bar
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor
